Created by the [[Plintep Cybernetics Corporation]], the '''RST Model Translator Droid''' was designed to be a pure translation droid. Built with [[Gender/Legends|feminine programming]] and large [[Breast/Legends|breasts]] due to the prominence of females in [[Mephout]] politics, the RST Model was made to translate languages without the subtlety and nuances of a [[Protocol droid/Legends|protocol droid]].

The RST model was susceptible to electromagnetic pulses that adversely affected their rationality circuits and life preservation programming. The defects led to many problems during Mephout government affairs, including a dozen assassinations, half a dozen declarations of war, and a proposal of marriage.

Considered a liability, the RST series were retired, sold off or given away as presents. They were replaced by modern protocol droids.

==Known RST units==
*[[42-RST]] (Rusti)
